ConstructorArguments: Create a nested ICompiledReferenceTrack that targets a GameObject with the given name.
Create a nested ICompiledReferenceTrack that targets a Component with the given type.
Create a nested ICompiledReferenceTrack that targets a Component with the type T.
Create a nested ICompiledPropertyTrack that targets a property with the given name in the parent track.
Create a nested ICompiledPropertyTrack that targets a property with the given name in the parent track.
Create a nested ICompiledPropertyTrack that targets an item with the given index in the parent collection property track.

Helper for creating a compiled child track with the given name and value type.

Some special cases if the parent track is a GameObject reference track:
  • Returns a game object reference track
  • Returns a component reference track
By default, returns a property track.

Documentation.Summary:
<para>
            Helper for creating a compiled child track with the given <paramref name="name" /> and value <paramref name="type" />.
            </para><para>
            Some special cases if the parent track is a <see cref="T:Sandbox.GameObject" /> reference track:
            <list type="bullet"><item><term><paramref name="type" /> is <see cref="T:Sandbox.GameObject" /></term><description>Returns a game object reference track</description></item><item><term><paramref name="type" /> extends <see cref="T:Sandbox.Component" /></term><description>Returns a component reference track</description></item></list>
            By default, returns a property track.
            </para>

ConstructorArguments: Returns a clone of track with an appended CompiledConstantBlock with the given timeRange and value.
Returns a clone of track with an appended CompiledSampleBlock with the given timeRange, sampleRate, and list of sample values.

Interpreting samples as an array of samples taken at a given sampleRate, read a sample from the array at the given time offset from the first sample. Optionally uses interpolator to interpolate between samples.
Helper methods for working with MovieClip, ICompiledTrack, or ICompiledBlock.

Documentation.Summary: Helper methods for working with <see cref="T:Sandbox.MovieMaker.Compiled.MovieClip" />, <see cref="T:Sandbox.MovieMaker.Compiled.ICompiledTrack" />, or <see cref="T:Sandbox.MovieMaker.Compiled.ICompiledBlock" />.
